info.name: Watchtower — Backend QA
info.description:
Full backend test suite for Watchtower. Run in order: Auth → Vendors → Payments → Webhooks → Authorization. All Server Actions are tested via their underlying Next.js Server Action POST endpoint.

Pre-requisites:
1. `npm run dev` running at http://localhost:3000
2. `npx prisma migrate dev` applied (fresh DB)

Collection Variables (set in Postman):
- BASE_URL: http://localhost:3000
- PSP_WEBHOOK_SECRET: psp-webhook-dev-secret
- SESSION_COOKIE: (auto-set by tests)
- OWNER_SESSION: (auto-set)
- MAKER_SESSION: (auto-set)
- VENDOR_ID: (auto-set)
- PAYMENT_ID: (auto-set)
- COMPLIANCE_PAYMENT_ID: (auto-set)

exec: pm.test('Session cookie set (check manually — Next.js may inline redirect)', () => true);
pm.test('Response is 200 (error returned in body)', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
